import json, re

# Load the Quranic verses database
with open('/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

def normalize(text):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel, normalize hamza variants, punctuation
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    text = diacritics.sub('', text)
    text = text.replace('ـ','')
    # normalize alif/hamza forms
    text = (text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
                 .replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه'))
    # remove punctuation and non-letters
    text = re.sub(r'[^ء-ي\s]', ' ', text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

target = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَى أُمَمٍ مِن قَبْلِكَ فَأَخَذْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ الْعَذَابَ فَهَلْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ"
norm_target = normalize(target)

# Search for verses containing a close substring
candidates = []
for v in quran:
    ayah = v['ayah_text']
    n = normalize(ayah)
    # simple token overlap score
    tokens_t = set(norm_target.split())
    tokens_v = set(n.split())
    overlap = len(tokens_t & tokens_v) / max(1,len(tokens_t))
    if 'ولقد ارسلنا الى امم من قبلك' in n or overlap > 0.4:
        candidates.append((overlap, ayah))
        
# Sort by overlap desc and show top 10
candidates_sorted = sorted(candidates, key=lambda x: -x[0])[:15]
candidates_sorted[:10]

content.text: {"correction":"وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَىٰ أُمَمٍ مِنْ قَبْلِكَ فَأَخَذْنَاهُمْ بِالْبَأْسَاءِ وَالضَّرَّاءِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَضَرَّعُونَ"}
